channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Whistleblowers claim Border Patrol surveillance cameras 'out of service' as GOP demands answers from DHS
item.description: Whistleblowers have come forward about an alarming issue at the southern border claiming that crucial remote surveillance cameras in multiple sectors have not been operational.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Family of Erik and Lyle Menendez call for their release and say they're victims who were vilified
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Multiple generations of family members of Erik and Lyle Menendez pleaded for the brothers' release from prison on Wednesday, saying they deserve to be free despite life sentences for the 1989 killings of their parents in Beverly Hills because they had been “brutalized” and sexuall
item.dc:creator: STEFANIE DAZIO, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Harris' interview with Fox News is marked by testy exchanges over immigration and more
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Vice President Kamala Harris engaged in a combative interview with Fox News on Wednesday, sparring with anchor Bret Baier on immigration and shifting policy positions while asserting that if elected, she would not represent a continuation of Joe Biden's presidency.
item.dc:creator: ZEKE MILLER, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: 3 dead, at least 4 injured after bridge collapses in Mississippi
item.description: Three people have died and at least four were injured after a bridge collapsed in Mississippi on Wednesday, according to authorities.
item.dc:creator: Cameron Smith, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Biden eulogizes Ethel Kennedy as 'hero' who put her own stamp on country
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President Joe Biden eulogized the late Ethel Kennedy in deeply personal terms at a memorial service Wednesday, hailing the wife of the late Sen. Robert F.
item.dc:creator: KEVIN FREKING and DARLENE SUPERVILLE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: La Nina could soon arrive. Here's what that means for winter weather
item.description: The National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration’s Climate Prediction Center says there is a 60% chance that a weak La Nina event will develop this autumn and could last until March.
item.dc:creator: ISABELLA O'MALLEY, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: 2 visitors to Hawaii dead after being swept out to sea
item.description: Safety officials said there were signs posted for beachgoers, warning of the strong current and dangerous shore break.
item.dc:creator: Stephen Florino, NewsNation

item.title: Federal money to help states hit by hurricanes Helene and Milton nears $2 billion
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The federal government has approved nearly $2 billion in assistance across six states to help people hit hard by hurricanes Helene and Milton, the White House said Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: REBECCA SANTANA, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Man shot in Las Vegas casino pleads guilty to stabbing 2 hotel employees
item.description: The man who stabbed two Las Vegas resort employees before a security officer shot him in the middle of the casino entered a plea Tuesday and will be sentenced in November, records said.
item.dc:creator: David Charns, NewsNation

item.title: Trump: Black and Hispanic voters who vote for Harris 'gotta have your head examined'
item.description: “Any African American or Hispanic– and you know how well I’m doing there – that votes for Kamala, you gotta have your head examined,” Trump said.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, NewsNation

item.title: ISIS-K orchestrated foiled Election Day terror plot: US official
item.description: Afghan native Nasir Ahmad Tawhedi, 27, was arrested in early October and accused of planning to target people on Election Day.
item.dc:creator: Anna Kutz, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Robert Telles sentenced for murder of Las Vegas journalist Jeff German
item.description: Robert Telles is accused of plotting to kill Las Vegas Review-Journal reporter Jeff German, 69, after he wrote some unflattering news stories about him that he felt caused him to lose the election.
item.dc:creator: Caroline Bleakley, NewsNation

item.title: Biden delivers final eulogy during Ethel Kennedy memorial service in DC
item.description: Ethel Kennedy, 96, died last week. She had been hospitalized after suffering a stroke earlier this month.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Clint Eastwood's daughter arrested in Beverly Hills in domestic violence case
item.description: Actor Francesca Eastwood, daughter of legendary actor Clint Eastwood, was arrested in Beverly Hills over the weekend on suspicion of felony domestic violence, according to reporting from the Los Angeles Times.
item.dc:creator: Josh DuBose, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Navy: Fighter jet with two on board crashed in Washington state during training
item.description: The U.S. Navy was searching for two aviators who went missing after their plane crashed during a routine training flight in Washington state.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Nebraska court allows voter registrations from people with felony convictions
item.description: Nebraskans with felony convictions may register to vote after the state's highest court ruled Wednesday that a top election official had no authority to deem a law restoring those rights unconstitutional.
item.dc:creator: Ella Lee, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: FTC announces rule to make it easier to cancel subscriptions
item.description: The department will soon implement a "final click to cancel rule," a move that will require sellers to make it "as easy for consumers to cancel their enrollment as it was to sign up.
item.dc:creator: Dominick Mastrangelo, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Lyft launches voter transportation initiative
item.description: Ride-hailing service Lyft announced that it will offer discounted rideshare, bike-share and scooters on Election Day, an initiative designed to increase transportation access for voters, according to a press release.
item.dc:creator: Juliann Ventura, Fox 5

item.title: Brightest supermoon rising this week, and it won't be alone
item.description: Get ready to look up for the year’s biggest and brightest supermoon. And it's pairing up with a comet for a rare stargazing two-for-one.
item.dc:creator: Dominique Jack, WGN 9

item.title: Small business disaster loan program is out of money until Congress approves new funds
item.description: House Speaker Mike Johnson assured there would be support to provide necessary funds – when Congress returns after the November election.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Michelle Obama will headline an Atlanta rally aimed at boosting voter turnout
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Former first lady Michelle Obama will headline a rally in Atlanta a week before the Nov. 5 election alongside celebrities and civic leaders focusing on engaging younger and first-time voters, as well as voters of color. The Oct.
item.dc:creator: MATT BROWN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Republicans challenge more than 63,000 voters in Georgia, but few removed, AP finds
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — From Georgia's mountains to its Atlantic shore, challenges to the qualifications of voters have rolled in this summer and fall, part of a wide-ranging national effort coordinated by Donald Trump’s allies to enlist Republican activists to remove people they view as suspect from the vot
item.dc:creator: JEFF AMY and CHARLOTTE KRAMON, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Prosecutor to 'review' Marilyn Manson rape allegations after victim calls DA out weeks before election
item.description: Los Angeles investigators have "new evidence" in connection with rape allegations against Marilyn Manson from former "Game of Thrones" actress Esme Bianco.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: A Texas board rejects clemency plea from a man facing execution in shaken baby syndrome case
item.description: The Texas Board of Pardons and Paroles has denied a request for clemency for a man who this week could be the first person in the U.S. executed for a murder conviction tied to the diagnosis of shaken baby syndrome.
item.dc:creator: Juan A. Lozano, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Mexico's former public security chief set to be sentenced in US drug case
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Mexico's former public security chief is set to be sentenced in a U.S. court on Wednesday after being convicted of taking bribes to aid drug traffickers.
item.dc:creator: LARRY NEUMEISTER, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: North Carolina man shot, killed outside of his own wedding; family wants answers
item.description: Tyrek Burton, 37, was fatally shot outside his own wedding reception at Barber Park Events Center in Greensboro, North Carolina, over the weekend.
item.dc:creator: Elijah Skipper, KRON4

item.title: Bills acquire wide receiver Amari Cooper from Browns, giving QB Josh Allen a much-needed playmaker
item.description: Amari Cooper went from a fading No. 1 wide receiver in Cleveland to a top one with Buffalo. Looking to add a playmaker for quarterback Josh Allen, the Bills acquired Cooper on Tuesday in a trade with the skidding Browns, whose season seems to be unraveling by the week with the NFL’s worst offense.
item.dc:creator: JOHN WAWROW and TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Rufus Wainwright blasts Trump playing 'Hallelujah' at town hall: 'The height of blasphemy'
item.description: The 51-year-old singer said Tuesday that he was "horrified" to learn his 2001 cover of Leonard Cohen's "Hallelujah" was part of the playlist at the Trump campaign event a night earlier.
item.dc:creator: Judy Kurtz, KRON4

item.title: The Super Bowl will return to Atlanta in 2028: Where will it be played before that?
item.description: Atlanta has secured the 2028 Super Bowl - here are the other cities that will host the NFL's championship game before then.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: NHC monitoring 2 disturbances in the Atlantic and Caribbean | Tracking the Tropics
item.description: With Florida's Gulf Coast left reeling after back-to-back major hurricanes, our Tracking the Tropics team explains what could spare the region from experiencing a third storm within a month.
item.dc:creator: Ashley Suter, Fox 5

item.title: Man allegedly killed by son,19, in California was renowned photojournalist
item.description: In a bizarre twist to a grisly crime on a popular hiking trail in the San Gabriel Mountains where a 19-year-old man allegedly stabbed his father to death, the victim has been identified as a well-known, award-winning war photographer, photojournalist and professor at the University of the Arts Londo
item.dc:creator: Josh DuBose, Fox 5

item.title: NHC monitoring 2 disturbances in the Atlantic and Caribbean | Tracking the Tropics
item.description: With Florida's Gulf Coast left reeling after back-to-back major hurricanes, our Tracking the Tropics team explains what could spare the region from experiencing a third storm within a month.
item.dc:creator: Ashley Suter, WGN 9

item.title: 6 people accuse Diddy of sexual assault in new lawsuits, including man who was 16 at the time
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Sean “Diddy” Combs was hit Monday with a new wave of lawsuits accusing him of raping women, sexually assaulting men and molesting a 16-year-old boy.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL R. SISAK, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Massive meat recall includes hundreds of products sold at Walmart, Target, more
item.description: Check your fridge and freezer: A massive meat recall linked to possible listeria contamination has impacted hundreds of ready-to-eat meals sold at major grocery store chains across the U.S., including Walmart, Trader Joe's and Target.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Jackson, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Two men shot during Pennsylvania assassination attempt on Trump say Secret Service failed them
item.description: BUTLER, Pa. (AP) — Two men who were shot during the first assassination attempt on Donald Trump this summer say the U.S. Secret Service was “negligent” in protecting the former president and other bystanders at the campaign rally in Pennsylvania.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: 6 people accuse Diddy of sexual assault in new wave of lawsuits
item.description: Sean “Diddy” Combs was hit Monday with a new wave of lawsuits accusing him of raping women, sexually assaulting men and molesting a 16-year-old boy.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Here’s how to qualify for FEMA aid — including the $750 payment
item.description: That $750 has been mischaracterized by several high-profile politicians, including former President Donald Trump.
item.dc:creator: Sean Noone, WFLA, NBC
